resolution: Add the missing package to your requirements.txt or rebuild the Docker image.
Check the IAM roles for the service account and ensure it has access to both BigQuery and the underlying source (e.g., Google Drive).
Align the column names and types between the query and the target table.
Explicitly define the schema instead of relying on automatic inference.
Check network latency or increase the timeout setting in the operator.
Verify the path or table name and ensure it was created in previous steps.
